headline: ComEd Continues Power Restoration Following Two Powerful Storms
summary: CHICAGO, July 04, 2026--ComEd crews continue to make progress restoring power to customers after a triple punch of severe storms swept across northern Illinois on Thursday night and Friday afternoon. The most severely impacted areas were the north and south regions of ComEd’s territory including Tinley Park, Burbank, Homewood and some southern wards in the City among the hardest hit areas. The storms brought heavy rain, frequent lightning and wind gusts over 50 miles per hour, causing extensive
